title: Default 8×8
description: This resource pack changes the appearance of default blocks to half the vanilla size (8×8).
body:
![NORMALversion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fec6fc22042af25d47ffbc581039a8eeea1a8195.webp)
# Default 8×8
This resource pack is a simple pack that changes the appearance of blocks to half their default size.
